scripts.gate: bun run ws:typecheck && bun run ws:lint && bun run ws:format:check && bun run ws:test:cov
scripts.test:scripts-unit: bunx vitest run scripts/assert-isolated-node-modules.test.mjs packages/e2e/link-workspace.test.ts packages/e2e/dev-harness.test.ts scripts/publish.test.mjs scripts/new-package.test.mjs scripts/build-public.test.mjs scripts/preflight-versions.test.mjs scripts/gen-readmes.test.mjs
scripts.gate:full: bun run gate && bun run lint && bun run test:types && bun run --cwd packages/e2e typecheck && bun scripts/assert-isolated-node-modules.mjs && bun run test:scripts-unit && bun run --filter '@lesto/content-*' test && bun run --cwd packages/integration test && bun run examples:test && bun run --filter '@lesto/site' test && bun run --filter '@lesto/site' build && bun run bundle-size && bun run test:pack-boot && bun run test:pack-import && git ls-files -z '*.sh' | xargs -0 -r -n1 bash -n
